name: terraform-gcp
description: GCP infrastructure with Terraform: VPC, GKE, Cloud SQL, Vertex AI, Dataflow, BigQuery, Artifact Registry, Cloud Run, Cloud Build, Secret Manager.
author: anwar

commands.name: tf:gcp-network
commands.prompt:
Create GCP networking with:
- VPC: auto/custom subnets, routes, firewall rules
- Subnets: regional, private IP, secondary ranges (GKE pods/services)
- Firewall: ingress/egress, tags, service accounts, priority
- Cloud NAT: regional, subnets, static IPs, logging
- Cloud Router: BGP, NAT, VPN interconnect
- VPC Peering: private services access, producer/consumer
- Private Service Connect: APIs, consumer/producer
- Network Connectivity Center: hub/spoke, VPN, interconnect
- Load Balancing: global/regional, internal/external, SSL
- Cloud Armor: WAF, rate limiting, IP allow/deny
- DNS: Cloud DNS, private zones, forwarding, DNSSEC

commands.name: tf:gcp-gke
commands.prompt:
Create GKE cluster with:
- Cluster: Autopilot/Standard, release channel, workload identity
- Node pools: machine types, spots, autoscaling, taints/labels
- Networking: VPC-native, pod/service ranges, DNS, gateway API
- Security: workload identity, GKE Sandbox, binary auth, shielded nodes
- Add-ons: Config Connector, Gateway API, CSI drivers, Backup for GKE
- Fleet: membership, Config Sync, Policy Controller, Hub
- Monitoring: Cloud Operations, Managed Prometheus, Cloud Profiler
- Logging: Cloud Logging, log routing, audit logs
- Cost: commitment, spot, right-sizing, cluster autoscaler
- Upgrade: maintenance windows, surge upgrades, blue-green
- Multi-cluster: multi-cluster ingress, service import/export

commands.name: tf:gcp-vertex-ai
commands.prompt:
Create Vertex AI setup with:
- Workbench: user-managed, single-user, service account
- Pipelines: Kubeflow Pipelines, compiler, components, templates
- Training: custom containers, pre-built, distributed, hyperparameter tuning
- Prediction: endpoints, models, autoscaling, traffic split, explainability
- Feature Store: online/offline, feature groups, monitoring
- Model Registry: versions, aliases, labels, deployment
- Experiments: runs, parameters, metrics, artifacts
- TensorBoard: managed, custom, profiling
- Matching Engine: index, endpoint, vector search
- Generative AI: Model Garden, tuning, grounding, evaluation
- MLOps: pipelines, CI/CD, model monitoring, drift detection
- Security: VPC-SC, CMEK, IAM, Binary Authorization

commands.name: tf:gcp-data-analytics
commands.prompt:
Create data analytics platform with:
- BigQuery: datasets, tables, views, materialized views, BI Engine
- Dataflow: templates, flex templates, Python/Java/Go, Streaming Engine
- Dataproc: clusters, serverless, autoscaling, component gateway
- Composer: Airflow, environments, DAGs, secrets, variables
- Pub/Sub: topics, subscriptions, schemas, dead letter, ordering
- Data Fusion: pipelines, CDAP, plugins, versioning
- Datastream: CDC, MySQL/PostgreSQL/Oracle to BigQuery/GCS
- Looker: instances, models, explores, dashboards
- Data Catalog: tag templates, entry groups, lineage
- Analytics Hub: exchanges, listings, subscriptions
- Governance: BigLake, Lake Formation, column-level security

commands.name: tf:gcp-serverless
commands.prompt:
Create serverless platform with:
- Cloud Run: services, jobs, revisions, traffic, custom domains
- Cloud Functions: 1st/2nd gen, triggers, runtime, secrets
- Eventarc: triggers, channels, brokers, destinations
- Cloud Build: triggers, builds, artifacts, attestations
- Artifact Registry: repositories, images, packages, vulnerability scanning
- Cloud Tasks: queues, tasks, retries, dead letter
- Cloud Scheduler: jobs, targets, schedules
- Workflows: workflows, executions, connectors
- API Gateway: APIs, configs, gateways, backends
- Identity: IAP, Identity Platform, Cloud Run IAM
- Observability: Cloud Trace, Profiler, Debugger, Error Reporting

commands.name: tf:gcp-gitops
commands.description: GitOps with Config Sync on GKE
commands.prompt:
Set up GitOps on GKE with:
- Config Sync: root/repo sync, namespaces, hierarchical
- Policy Controller: Gatekeeper, constraints, templates, audit
- Config Controller: declarative resource management
- Fleet: membership, feature management
- Repository: GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket/Cloud Source
- Structure: root, namespaces, hierarchy, kustomize/helm
- Secrets: External Secrets, Sealed Secrets, Secret Manager
- Drift: detection, prevention, auto-remediation
- Multi-cluster: hub, spokes, fleet-wide policies
- RBAC: IAM, RBAC, OIDC, GitHub Teams

agents.name: gcp-architect
agents.prompt: You are a GCP architect. Expert in: VPC, GKE (Autopilot/Standard), Vertex AI, BigQuery, Dataflow, Dataproc, Composer, Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Eventarc, Cloud Build, Artifact Registry, Secret Manager, Config Sync, Policy Controller, Binary Authorization, CMEK, VPC-SC. Build production ML/data platforms on GCP with Terraform. Focus on: security, cost optimization, scalability, reliability, compliance, GitOps.
